{{Infobox character
| name = Maraan
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Maraan]] is the High Priest of [[Abyssal Palace]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14">''Wintersteel'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Maraan]] has a spiritual injury from his youth that prevented him from reaching [[Overlord]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Maraan]] has not lost a duel against anyone at his stage in twenty years.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Maraan]] raised [[Brother Aekin]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
